process_step.step_name: Match Assets to Site Plan Drawing Symbols
process_step.details: Extract ALL numeric labels visible in each drawing chunk. Asset IDs appear as standalone multi-digit numbers adjacent to drawing symbols. Legend entries for symbol matching: [{"label": "EXISTING OVERHEAD MAINS", "description": "dashed line"}, {"label": "EXISTING UNDERGROUND CABLE", "description": "long dash short dash line"}, {"label": "REMOVE EXISTING OVERHEAD", "description": "x x x x x"}, {"label": "NEW UNDERGROUND MAINS", "description": "short dash long dash line"}, {"label": "NEW OVERHEAD CONDUCTOR", "description": "solid line"}, {"label": "NEW LV TRENCH", "description": "Long dashed line"}, {"label": "EXISTING POLE", "description": "Small solid black filled circle"}, {"label": "REMOVE POLE", "description": "Small solid black filled circle with large X through it"}, {"label": "NEW POLE", "description": "Small hollow open circle"}, {"label": "REPLACE POLE", "description": "Circle split vertically half-black half-white"}, {"label": "REMOVE SL LANTERN", "description": "lighting bolt"}, {"label": "EXISTING SL LANTERN", "description": "lighting bolt inside a square"}, {"label": "NEW SL LANTERN", "description": "lighting bolt with a plus sign"}, {"label": "NEW SL FLOOD", "description": "lighting bolt with a triangle"}, {"label": "EXISTING PILLAR", "description": "Solid black filled rectangle"}, {"label": "NEW COLUMN", "description": "Small hollow open square"}, {"label": "EXISTING COLUMN", "description": "Small solid black filled square"}, {"label": "UGOH", "description": "filled downward pointing triangle"}, {"label": "JOINT", "description": "short curved solid line"}, {"label": "END SHACKLE", "description": "curved line with vertical line"}, {"label": "EXISTING HV USL CLOSED", "description": "two crossed lines"}, {"label": "EXISTING SL NIGHT WATCH", "description": "asterisk inside a square"}, {"label": "EXISTING HV ABS CLOSE - REMOVE", "description": "two circles inside a square with line across the diagonal"}, {"label": "NEW HV ABS CLOSE", "description": "two circles inside a square"}, {"label": "NEW SLCP ZELL", "description": "slcp in a circle with line on top"}, {"label": "EXISTING SLCP ZELL - REMOVE", "description": "slcp in a circle with line on top and line going through"}]

expected_output.description: All numeric labels visible in this chunk with adjacent symbol info

fields.found_ids: array of all numeric label strings visible in this chunk

sub_steps.sub_step_name: Find Asset IDs in Drawing Chunk
sub_steps.details: Scan this drawing chunk image and extract EVERY numeric label you can see. Asset IDs are standalone multi-digit numbers (4-10 digits) positioned adjacent to drawing symbols (poles, lanterns, pillars, cables, etc.) on the reticulation site plan. Do NOT filter by any expected list — report every number you can read.
sub_steps.output_format: ["302876", "2002180", "402679"] — plain JSON array of numeric ID strings, no wrapper object
